error_signature: Test URL does not respect WEBHOOK_URL variable
title: Test URL not using WEBHOOK_URL in webhook node
symptom: The Test URL for webhook nodes is using N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL instead of the specified WEBHOOK_URL, leading to inconsistencies between test and production URLs.
root_cause: When N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL is defined, it takes precedence over the WEBHOOK_URL for generating the Test URL in webhook nodes. This can lead to confusion as the Test URL does not match the expected production URL.
fix_steps: Test the webhook node again to verify the URL
agent_instruction: Remove the N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL variable to ensure the Test URL uses WEBHOOK_URL.
